title: Non-Sterile Cell Analysis
author: Opentrons
materials: 96-Well Plate with Reagents (in lieu of Tube Rack) *These should be loaded in the same well number as tube rack* * A1 * A2 * A3 * A4 * A5 * A6 * B1 * B2 * B3 * B4 * C1 * C2 * C3 * C4 * C5 * C6 * D1 * D2 * D3 * D4 Slot 3: [NEST 12-Well Reservoir](https://labware.opentrons.com/nest_12_reservoir_15ml?category=reservoir) * A
Upload your protocol into the OT App.

steps.title: FACS Buffer * A3
steps.instruction: FACS Buffer * A3: 'B6' Reagent (for step 5) * A

steps.title: Set up your deck according to the deck map
steps.instruction: Set up your deck according to the deck map.

steps.title: Calibrate your labware, tiprack and pipette using the OT App
steps.instruction: Calibrate your labware, tiprack and pipette using the OT App. For calibration tips, check out our support articles.
